name: combobox-demo
visual_summary: The combobox-demo is a dropdown menu with a text input field. It allows users to select a value from a list or type a value manually. This component is useful when a user needs to select one option from a long list, but also wants to be able to manually enter a custom value.
generation_prompt:
Create a production-ready input component with the following characteristics:

Name: combobox-demo
Description: The combobox-demo is a dropdown menu with a text input field. It allows users to select a value from a list or type a value manually. This component is useful when a user needs to select one option from a long list, but also wants to be able to manually enter a custom value.
Style: default, boxed
Interactions: clickable, hover
Tags: dropdown, select, input

Requirements:
- Works in React with TypeScript by default but adaptable to Vue, Svelte, or plain HTML/CSS
- Uses Tailwind CSS for styling
- Fully accessible with ARIA labels and keyboard navigation
- Responsive and mobile-friendly
- No external dependencies beyond React and Tailwind unless necessary
- Include all necessary imports
- Export as default with sensible prop types

Generate clean production-ready code only. No explanations.
